The ColorSync Manager defines the structure [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/applicationservices/cm2header] to represent the profile header for the version 2.x profile format defined by the ICC.The `deviceAttributes` field of the `CM2Header` structure is an array of two unsigned long values whose bits specify information about a profile. # Device Attribute Values for Version 2.x Profiles

Define masks your application can use to set or test bits in the `deviceAttributes `field of the `CM2Header` structure.

## Overview

The ColorSync Manager defines the structure [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/applicationservices/cm2header] to represent the profile header for the version 2.x profile format defined by the ICC.The `deviceAttributes` field of the `CM2Header` structure is an array of two unsigned long values whose bits specify information about a profile. The ICC reserves the use of `deviceAttributes[1]` and has assigned values to bits 0 and 1. All the bits of `deviceAttributes[0]` are reserved for use by color management system (CMS) vendors.  

## Constants

- **cmReflectiveTransparentMask**
- **cmGlossyMatteMask**
title: Device Attribute Values for Version 2.x Profiles
